provides.name: tesseract ocr
provides.summary: Local-first OCR review for OpenClerk artifact_candidate_plan over common image files.

provides.name: ocrmypdf ocr
provides.summary: Local-first scanned-PDF OCR review sidecar extraction for OpenClerk artifact_candidate_plan.

provides.name: tesseract-ocr
provides.summary: Optional module skill for installed local OCR review.

artifacts.cache: temporary process-local files only; no committed OCR cache

steps: Install tesseract and ocrmypdf outside OpenClerk core.
Register the module with openclerk module install_module and this manifest.
Configure language, tesseract command, and ocrmypdf command through openclerk module configure_module.
install.uninstall: Run openclerk module remove_module for provider tesseract, then remove optional tools and any temporary user-cache directories without changing OpenClerk core.

compatibility.openclerk_runner: routes explicit document artifact_candidate_plan text_extraction ocr_review through verified module registration
compatibility.schema: returns reviewed candidate text and OCR provenance in artifact_candidate_plan; durable writes still require existing create_document or ingest_source_url approval
